params.name: Pride & Prejudice
params.description:
On Mar 23, 1813 AD, Pride and Prejudice was published in Britain.
Pride and Prejudice is a novel written by English writer Jane Austen. It describes the love stories of the five daughters of the Bennet family. The main character of the story is Elizabeth, the second-eldest Bennet daughter. She meets Mr. Darcy at a ball, but she repulses him because she hears that he is arrogant. After all kinds of twists and turns, their prejudice surrender to their love for each other. Elizabeth's different …
